# CWE-309 — Use of Password System for Primary Authentication (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-309-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: enterprise SSO route still accepts password form login only.
func EnterpriseLogin(c *gin.Context) {
	user := c.PostForm("username")
	pass := c.PostForm("password")
	if user == "" || pass == "" {
		c.JSON(400, gin.H{"error": "missing fields"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"session": user})
}
